name: Prespra
description: A creature subjected to Prespra must succeed on a {@dc 11} Constitution saving throw or take 3 ({@dice 1d6}) Poison damage and have the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition. The creature also has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition while {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} in this way. The creature repeats the save at the start of each of its turns, taking 3 ({@dice 1d6}) Poison damage on a failed save. On a successful save, the effect ends for the creature.
